key_finding: Layer 21 is activation-sensitive. With seed=42, delta_cos=+0.02151 (improves). With seed=63 (31AS), delta_cos=-0.02577 (regresses). 9/10 seeds improve cosine. Without a consistent-seed re-sweep of all 24 layers, classification is PARTIAL_LAYER21_ACTIVATION_SENSITIVE.
